method: Expo web export (expo export -p web) served locally on http://localhost:4200 (origin already allowed by Go + MS2 CORS); Playwright mobile viewport 390x844. No paid EAS/native build.

scenarios.home: pass — app boots on web (SecureStore/native shims OK), customer entry screen
scenarios.login: pass — customer login cliente@ficct.local via Go GraphQL, navigates to Catálogo
scenarios.catalog: pass — 4 real products from Go (Falda BOB 290, Vestido BOB 620, Pantalón BOB 480, Blusa BOB 350), each 6 variantes; tab bar Catálogo/Buscar/Carrito/Sucursales/Avisos
scenarios.productDetail: pass — SKU FLD-001, BOB 290, 6 variants with size·color·stock (e.g. L·blanco 23 en stock)
scenarios.cart: pass — line item + quantity controls, Subtotal BOB 290.00, IVA 13% BOB 37.70, Total BOB 327.70, Confirmar pedido
scenarios.aiSearch: pass — Búsqueda visual (similar-garment) screen renders (expo-image-picker entry; MS2 image-matching)
scenarios.branchesGps: pass — Sucursales with GPS distances (Boutique Equipetrol SC-02 3.7 km, Boutique Centro SC-01 4.8 km)
scenarios.push: pass — Avisos (notifications) screen renders (expo-notifications registration path)

nativeIntegrations.gps: expo-location (nearest branch; distances computed live on web)

consoleErrors: none after pointing the web build at prod URLs (initial run hit the dev fallback URL; fixed via EXPO_PUBLIC_* + cache-cleared re-export)
nativeOnlyNote: Web export is used for evidence only. True push delivery and native camera/GPS permissions are exercised on device via EAS (not run here, avoids paid builds).
